detectors.description: BoringVault.enter(address,ERC20,uint256,address,uint256) (src/base/BoringVault.sol#74-85) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: asset.safeTransferFrom(from,address(this),assetAmount) (src/base/BoringVault.sol#79)

FixedPointMathLib.rpow(uint256,uint256,uint256) (src/lib/solmate/src/utils/FixedPointMathLib.sol#71-158) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:

	- zx_rpow_asm_0 = z * x (src/lib/solmate/src/utils/FixedPointMathLib.sol#134)
